name: the same file yields a byte-identical native verdict from the consult path and the development write path
command:
printf 'const x: any = 1;' > a.ts
V1=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-write-time.sh" a.ts 2>&1 | grep -oE 'status=[a-z]+ rules_checked=[0-9]+ blocking=[0-9]+')
printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"a.ts","content":"const x: any = 1;"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" 2>gov.txt
V2=$(grep -oE 'status=[a-z]+ rules_checked=[0-9]+ blocking=[0-9]+' gov.txt)
[ -n "$V1" ] && [ "$V1" = "$V2" ] && echo "byte-identical-verdict $V1" 1>&2
